---
title: "Teaching"
output:
  html_document:
    toc_float: false
    fig_width: 1
---


### **Undergraduate**

* 2021:
  - Forecasting and Regression Models (in Portuguese), UFRJ (PLE 2020.2)
  - Statistics for Business (in Portuguese), UFRJ (PLE 2020.2)
  - [Forecasting and Regression Models (in Portuguese), UFRJ](MRP.html) (PLE 2020.1)
* 2020:
  - [Introduction to Probability and Statistics (in Portuguese), UFABC](IPE.html)
* 2018:
  - Probability (in Portuguese), EESP-FGV  (T.A.)
* 2015:
  - Statistics for experimentalist (in Portuguese), UNICAMP (T.A.)
  - Elementar Statistics (in Portuguese), UNICAMP (T.A.)
* 2012
  - Statistics for experimentalist (in Portuguese), UNICAMP (T.A.)
  - Introduction to probability models (in Portuguese), UNICAMP (T.A.)
* 2010
  - Statistical Computing (in Spanish), UNMSM (T.A.)
  
</br>
----

### **Short Courses**

* Modelling and forecasting financial risk measures, II Symposium on Mathematics and Applied Mathematics. Arequipa-Perú, 2019.
* Special topics in R software: Graduate program, National University of San Marcos. Lima-Perú, 2016.
* Special topics in R software: Ricardo Palma University. Lima-Perú, 2016.
* Data manipulation and data visualization in R: 17th Statistics week, University of Campinas. Campinas-Brazil, 2015.

</br>
----
